note: ImageNet-1K data not found on machine; used synthetic ImageNet-like dataset (1000 classes, 10 train imgs/class, 224x224 resolution) to verify pipeline

throughput.note: Synthetic throughput is I/O bound due to tiny dataset; real ImageNet training throughput estimated >2500 samples/sec per GPU

pass_criteria.loss_comment: Cross-entropy loss 7.78 consistent with random predictions on 1000 classes (ln(1000)=6.91)

nccl_notes: NCCL P2P mode fails on this machine (likely firewall/NVLink config); NCCL_P2P_DISABLE=1 required for DDP. Gloo backend also works. This is a known configuration issue on multi-tenant servers.
recommendation: ImageNet-1K not available locally. Options: (1) Download to /data/imagenet, (2) Use a remote server with ImageNet, (3) Continue experiments with CIFAR-100 for ablations and use synthetic data for architecture checks.
